ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the team (e.g., NE, Min, NO) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team participates */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being ranked */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number for the ranking */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team */,
  "previous_ranking" INTEGER /* Previous week's ranking of the team */,
  "power_rating" REAL /* Power rating of the team based on their performance */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season for the ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in ranking from the previous week */,
  "points_for" REAL /* Total points scored by the team in the current week */,
  "points_against" REAL /* Total points scored against the team in the current week */,
  "win_streak" INTEGER /* Current win streak of the team */,
  "lose_streak" INTEGER /* Current lose streak of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in that season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in that season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties for the team in that season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team in the season */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Whether the team made the playoffs */,
  "championship" INTEGER /* Whether the team won the championship */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach during the season */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the team captain during the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences stored in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
